steps.title: Choose two points on the line
steps.content: The line of best fit passes approximately through $(1,3.3)$ and $(7,14.5)$. Use the slope formula with these two points.

steps.title: Estimate the slope
steps.content: Calculate rise over run: $$m=\frac{14.5-3.3}{7-1}=\frac{11.2}{6}$$ This is about $1.87$. The closest listed value is $2$. The answer is D.
